questions: Which seeded controls are standalone-runnable for an engagement SDK?

findings.detail: qor-logic compliance enforce slots into cli_handlers/compliance.py register/dispatch (:86-104)
all 5 deterministic gates expose main(argv)->int (exit 0/1); clean runner={module,entry,args}
